## Collections.AggregatedResultMapBase.set() method

Sets an item by its composite ID. Creates the collection if it doesn't exist and is mutable.

**Signature:**

```typescript
set(key: TCOMPOSITEID, value: TITEM): DetailedResult<TITEM, ResultMapResultDetail>;
```

[DetailedResult](./ts-utils.detailedresult.md)<!-- -->&lt;TITEM, [ResultMapResultDetail](./ts-utils.collections.resultmapresultdetail.md)<!-- -->&gt;
